reasoning: The control AC-5-b focuses on defining system access authorizations to enforce separation of duties, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC configurations. Ensuring that no users or service accounts have cluster-admin privileges without justification aligns with the principle of least privilege. Additionally, enforcing role separation of duties can be achieved by creating specific roles with limited permissions and binding them appropriately to users or service accounts.
